records.m_Talk_ENG: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not just me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not just me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not just me.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Someone will come to save us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Someone will come to save us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Someone will come to save us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This flare...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This flare...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This flare...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional ship...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional ship...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional ship...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! True enough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! True enough!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! True enough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you learned last time, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you learned last time, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you learned last time, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll draw its attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll draw its attention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll draw its attention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can take it head-on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can take it head-on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can take it head-on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-Kraken's barrel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-Kraken's barrel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-Kraken's barrel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ten years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ten years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ten years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because this time...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because this time...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because this time...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I swore I would not lose anyone again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I swore I would not lose anyone again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I swore I would not lose anyone again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To save the world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To save the world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To save the world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You don't resent me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You don't resent me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You don't resent me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Resent you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Resent you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Resent you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's just call it even.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's just call it even.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's just call it even.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So tell me how to move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So tell me how to move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So tell me how to move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Read. Let's begin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Read. Let's begin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Read. Let's begin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? W-what are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? W-what are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? W-what are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Official Counter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Official Counter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Official Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And one more thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And one more thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And one more thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are all captains this high-handed?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are all captains this high-handed?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are all captains this high-handed?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would I run?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would I run?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would I run?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you need me to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you need me to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you need me to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: First... you deserve to know the truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First... you deserve to know the truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First... you deserve to know the truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Show me? Show me what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Show me? Show me what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Show me? Show me what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Bellamy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not about to let that slip away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not about to let that slip away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not about to let that slip away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny! What are you doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can escape, then do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can escape, then do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can escape, then do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Energy overload detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Energy overload detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Energy overload detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Immediate evacuation is advised.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Immediate evacuation is advised.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Immediate evacuation is advised.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm staying to the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm staying to the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm staying to the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be foolish...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be foolish...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be foolish...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's unbelievably romantic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's unbelievably romantic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's unbelievably romantic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ship will soon reach critical state.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ship will soon reach critical state.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ship will soon reach critical state.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nngh... What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nngh... What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nngh... What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A transmission... from the Administrator...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A transmission... from the Administrator...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A transmission... from the Administrator...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Moneka.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Moneka.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Moneka.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why throw your life away when you could live?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why throw your life away when you could live?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why throw your life away when you could live?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... my mother's voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... my mother's voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... my mother's voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see... So that's why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see... So that's why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see... So that's why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then... I need to ask you again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then... I need to ask you again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then... I need to ask you again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...To become a great pirate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...To become a great pirate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...To become a great pirate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Heh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Heh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Heh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've finally become a true pirate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've finally become a true pirate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've finally become a true pirate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this keeps up, we're all going to be wiped out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sending out support requests, but... the dimension coordinates here are being scrambled in real time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely because the Grand Dimension Crevice is expanding!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Coordinates disrupting don't affect us at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some cheap coordinates jamming won't stop us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not just me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not just me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not just me.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
All of us who see this flare¬ñ
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Someone will come to save us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Someone will come to save us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Someone will come to save us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This flare...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This flare...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This flare...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Emergency dimension jump signal detected!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Identification code <color=#ffd34c>Invincible Mk.2</color>! Initiating emergency dimension jump!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional ship...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional ship...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional ship...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It looks kind of like the Invincible we saw last time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You understood the flare's mechanic perfectly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks. Because of you, I was able to get here safely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph. It's not like we had a choice if we wanted to live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means borrowing the annoying Administration's help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! True enough!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! True enough!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! True enough!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you learned last time, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you learned last time, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you learned last time, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hunters and pirates alike have to work together if we're going to overcome future obstacles!

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-detecting an intense heat source from Kraken!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, the ship will be in danger!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll draw its attention.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll draw its attention.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll draw its attention.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can take it head-on...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can take it head-on...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can take it head-on...

root.m_Talk_ENG: K-Kraken's barrel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: K-Kraken's barrel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: K-Kraken's barrel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ten years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ten years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ten years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've spent ten years training to cut that in a single stroke.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because this time...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because this time...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because this time...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I swore I would not lose anyone again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I swore I would not lose anyone again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I swore I would not lose anyone again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Auntie Mary...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Auntie Mary...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Auntie Mary...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! We all think and act differently, but our goal is the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To save the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that a romantic enough reason?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To save the world...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To save the world...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To save the world...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You don't resent me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You don't resent me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You don't resent me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Resent you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Resent you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Resent you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like how you passed out and drifted at sea while my mom rammed a ship into Kraken's jaws?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or how you dumped your daughter and your friend's daughter at an orphanage and never looked back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure the reason you tolerated all my terrorism and talk of "liberating the city" was because of your guilt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's just call it even.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's just call it even.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's just call it even.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates don't dwell on the past, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So tell me how to move forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So tell me how to move forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So tell me how to move forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the captain of Front Bay, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not fond of formalities, but I have to say this here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Read. Let's begin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Read. Let's begin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Read. Let's begin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. This isn't exactly the best timing, but... with things as they are, we have no choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's the captain's will, I have no choice but to obey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? W-what are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? W-what are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? W-what are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As of today, I, Mary Crew, the Official Counter of Front Bay, resign my position.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Official Counter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Official Counter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Official Counter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Counter who was supposedly on medical leave... was you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera Bonny places the city's safety above all else, and regardless of the Administration's decisions, she has the right to freely sail the sea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Official Counter is an appointed position. Kiera Bonny may relinquish it whenever she chooses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And one more thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And one more thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And one more thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the Senior's absence, all Senior authority is transferred to Kiera Bonny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... Th-that's way too sudden!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are all captains this high-handed?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are all captains this high-handed?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are all captains this high-handed?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! Being reckless is what makes us pirates!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want the freedom you keep talking about, you're welcome to run away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've got no right or intention to hold you down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would I run?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would I run?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would I run?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you need me to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you need me to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you need me to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: First... you deserve to know the truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: First... you deserve to know the truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: First... you deserve to know the truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy, show Kiera <color=#ffd34c>that</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Show me? Show me what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Show me? Show me what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Show me? Show me what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A memory core. It contains the recording I captured twenty years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It holds your mother, Anne Bonny's, final moments.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny! All the tentacles holding the ship have been severed!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Everyone else has already escaped on the evacuation ships, so you need to¬ñ
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Bellamy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't end the Black Flood here, we may never get another chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not about to let that slip away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not about to let that slip away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not about to let that slip away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I pull this lever all the way, we'll ram straight into the thing, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny! What are you doing?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny! What are you doing?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny! What are you doing?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's still one evacuation ship left! If you leave now, everyone lives!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you can escape, then do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you can escape, then do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you can escape, then do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't know each other long... but I liked you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're an AI, so you can run anywhere you want, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the captain wakes up, tell him this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That I, Anne Bonny, saved the world once...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Energy overload detected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Energy overload detected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Energy overload detected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Immediate evacuation is advised.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Immediate evacuation is advised.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Immediate evacuation is advised.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm staying to the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm staying to the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm staying to the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be foolish...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be foolish...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be foolish...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration was founded to protect the world. To save as many lives as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If someone like you is willing to die for the world, how could we possibly¬ñ
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever seen the sunrise on Macha Island?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once Kraken falls... the island will show itself again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When it does, go to the cliff and watch the sunrise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's unbelievably romantic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's unbelievably romantic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's unbelievably romantic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ship will soon reach critical state.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ship will soon reach critical state.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ship will soon reach critical state.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All crew, evacuate immediately via the evacuation ships.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Bonny... You can still¬ñ
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nngh... What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nngh... What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nngh... What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A transmission... from the Administrator...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A transmission... from the Administrator...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A transmission... from the Administrator...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Moneka.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Moneka.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Moneka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to borrow the connection for a moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why throw your life away when you could live?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why throw your life away when you could live?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why throw your life away when you could live?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hear you have a daughter... and comrades waiting for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just... want my home to stay safe until my daughter becomes an adult.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A mother wishing for her child's safety... that's normal, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... my mother's voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... my mother's voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... my mother's voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see... So that's why...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see... So that's why...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see... So that's why...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then... I need to ask you again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then... I need to ask you again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then... I need to ask you again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera Bonny. Why do you want to sail the seas?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...To become a great pirate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...To become a great pirate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...To become a great pirate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For everyone I met. The ones who gave direction to a castaway with no navigator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the people who told me someone like me was worth trusting and waiting for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the person who showed me what it means to have something to protect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To understand my mother... who gave her life to protect others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To see the sunrise on Macha Island.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Heh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Heh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Heh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! That's ridiculously romantic, no?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've finally become a true pirate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've finally become a true pirate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've finally become a true pirate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. By Senior authority, I fully release Kiera Bonny from the output restraints.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've been storing power for quite a while. Feeling any discomfort?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was actually getting annoyed that I couldn't let this ridiculous strength loose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll blow its head clean off in one strike.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! That's the spirit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing that look on your face... it's like Anne Bonny herself has come back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like your mother saved her home, you go save the world!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone! Raise your weapons and mark your prey!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Front Bay's final hunt begins now!
